Title: User Registration
Test Data: User details including username, password, email, and personal information.
Test Steps:
1. Open the app and navigate to the registration screen.
2. Enter the required user details (username, password, email, etc.).
3. Click on the "Register" button.
4. Verify that the user is registered successfully.
Expected Result: The user should be registered successfully, and a confirmation message should appear.

Title: User Login
Test Steps:
1. Open the app and navigate to the login screen.
2. Enter the registered user's credentials (username and password).
3. Click on the "Login" button.
4. Verify that the user is logged in successfully.
Expected Result: The user should be logged in successfully, and the home screen should be displayed.

Title: Personal Item Management
Test Data: Details of an item to be added to the personal item list.
Test Steps:
1. After logging in, navigate to the personal item management section.
2. Add a new item with the specified details.
3. Save the changes.
4. Verify that the item has been added to the personal item list.
Expected Result: The item should be added to the personal item list, and a confirmation message should appear.

Title: Browse Offers
Test Steps:
1. After logging in, navigate to the offer exploration section.
2. Browse through the available offers.
3. Verify that the offers are displayed correctly.
Expected Result: The offers should be displayed correctly, and the user should be able to view them.

Title: Propose a Swap
Preconditions: User must be logged in and have items to swap.
Test Data: Details of the item to be swapped.
Test Steps:
1. After logging in, navigate to the proposal of swap section.
2. Select the item to be swapped.
3. Fill in the necessary details for the swap proposal.
4. Submit the proposal.
5. Verify that the proposal has been submitted successfully.
Expected Result: The swap proposal should be submitted successfully, and a confirmation message should appear.

Title: View Swap Proposals
Preconditions: User must be logged in and have received swap proposals.
Test Steps:
1. After logging in, navigate to the section where swap proposals are viewed.
2. Verify that the received swap proposals are listed.
3. Check the details of each proposal.
Expected Result: The swap proposals should be listed, and their details should be visible.

Title: Accept or Reject Swap Proposals
Module: Acceptance or Rejection of Swap Proposals
Preconditions: User must be logged in and have received swap proposals.
Test Steps:
1. After logging in, navigate to the section where swap proposals are accepted or rejected.
2. Select a proposal to accept or reject.
3. Confirm the action.
4. Verify that the action has been performed successfully.
Expected Result: The selected proposal should be either accepted or rejected, and a confirmation message should appear.

Title: Search Filters
Test Data: Search criteria such as item type, category, location, etc.
Test Steps:
1. After logging in, navigate to the search filters section.
2. Apply the specified search criteria.
3. Verify that the filtered results match the applied criteria.
Expected Result: The search results should match the applied search criteria.

Title: Update Personal Information
Test Steps:
1. After logging in, navigate to the section for updating personal information.
2. Enter the updated personal information.
3. Save the changes.
4. Verify that the personal information has been updated successfully.
Expected Result:
The personal information should be updated successfully, and a confirmation message should appear.
Note: Additional test cases can be generated for other sections as per the detailed specifications provided in the PDF. <|end|>

Title: View Personal Bulletin Board
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the personal bulletin board screen.
2. Display the list of previously published items.
Expected Result: The bulletin board displays the user's published items or is empty if no items are available.

Title: Publish New Items in Personal Bulletin Board
Test Steps:
1. Click the button to create a new item.
2. Fill out the form with the details of the item to be published.
3. Verify the correctness of the entered data and add it to the database.
Expected Result: The newly published item appears in the user's bulletin board along with other previously added items.

Title: Remove Items from Personal Bulletin Board
Preconditions: User logged into the application and at least one item published in the bulletin board.
Test Steps:
1. Click the delete button for the desired item.
2. Confirm the deletion request.
3. Remove the item from the database.
Expected Result: The selected item is removed from the user's bulletin board. If the item was bartered, it will also be removed. <|end|>

Title: Exploration of Offers
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the icon dedicated to viewing offers of other users.
2. Verify that the system displays offers from other users.
3. If no offers are available, verify that a blank screen is shown.
Expected Result: The system should display offers from other users or show a blank screen if no offers are available.

Title: Proposal of Swap
Preconditions: Registered and logged in, inside an offer of another user, at least one item in the personal board if the item is not free.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the icon within an offer published by another user.
2. Select an item from your own personal board to propose a swap.
Expected Result: The system should send a swap request to the other user.

Title: Visualization of Swap Proposals and Their Status
Module: Visualization of Swap Proposals and Their Status
Preconditions: At least one active swap proposal.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the screen related to active swap proposals.
2. Verify that the system provides a list of active proposals in chronological order.
3. Verify that the user can view details and the status of each proposal.
Expected Result: The system should display a list of active swap proposals with their respective statuses.

Title: Acceptance or Rejection of Swap Proposals
Module: Acceptance or Rejection of Swap Proposals
Preconditions: Registered and logged in, at least one item in the personal board, a swap proposal from another user.
Test Steps:
1. Receive a notification about a swap proposal for an item in your personal board.
2. View the swap proposal.
3. Tap on the icon to accept or reject the proposal.
Expected Result: The offeror should receive a notification about the outcome of the proposal.

Title: Modification of Personal Data
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the icon to access the personal data modification area.
2. Update personal data and confirm the validity of the entered data.
3. Verify that the system reflects the changes in the database.
Expected Result: The system should update the personal data in the database. <|assistant|>

Title: User can initiate a swap proposal
Preconditions: User is logged into the system and has items/services listed in their profile.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the swap section.
2. Select an item/service to propose a swap.
3. Confirm the swap proposal.
Expected Result: The swap proposal is successfully initiated and appears in the user's list of swap proposals.

Title: System checks item availability before swap proposal
Preconditions: User attempts to propose a swap for an item/service.
Test Steps:
1. User selects an item/service to propose a swap.
2. System checks if the item/service is still available.
3. System displays a message indicating whether the item/service is available or not.
Expected Result: If the item/service is not available, the system displays a message stating that the item/service is no longer available for swapping.

Title: User can accept a swap offer
Preconditions: User receives a swap offer for one of their items/services.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the swap section.
2. User views the swap offer.
3. User accepts the swap offer.
Expected Result: The swap offer is accepted, and the swap is added to the user's list of completed swaps.

Title: User can reject a swap offer
Preconditions: User receives a swap offer for one of their items/services.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the swap section.
2. User views the swap offer.
3. User rejects the swap offer.
Expected Result: The swap offer is rejected, and the offer remains in the user's list of pending swap offers.

Title: System displays the status of swap proposals
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the swap section.
2. User views the list of swap proposals.
Expected Result: The system displays the status of each swap proposal (accepted, rejected, or pending).

Title: User can filter search results by location and category

Preconditions: User has at least one item/service in the personal gallery.

PROJECT OVERVIEW:
A software application for managing personal items and services, including their publication, deletion, and exchange proposals. Users can publish items/services, delete them, and propose exchanges with other users.

Title: Visualizzazione delle proposte di scambio
Preconditions: L'utente deve essere loggato all'interno dell'applicazione e deve essere all'interno di un'apposita sezione dell'app.

2. Navigate to the specific section for swap proposals.

Preconditions: L'utente deve essere loggato all'interno dell'applicazione e deve essere all'interno di un'apposita sezione dell'app.
